channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Supreme Court Refuses to Address Police Excess in Delhi Protests
item.description: The article discusses the ongoing protests in Delhi, where the Supreme Court has refused to urgently address allegations of excessive police force against demonstrators. The court's decision has spark...

item.title: Defence Department withholds conflict of interest documents in $3 billion military property sale
item.description: The Australian Defence Department has refused to disclose conflict of interest declarations made by consultants hired to assess military sites for potential sale in a $3 billion property sell-off. Con...

item.title: Inter Miami Faces MLS Investigation Over Casemiro Signing
item.description: Inter Miami is under investigation by Major League Soccer (MLS) after signing Brazilian midfielder Casemiro. The probe centers on discovery rights, a rule that allows clubs to prioritize signing speci...

item.title: UK Inflation Rate Surpasses 4.3% in March 2023, Reflecting Economic Challenges
item.description: The UK's inflation rate rose to 4.3% in March 2023, marking a significant increase from the previous month's 3.9%. This surge is attributed to a combination of factors, including rising energy prices,...

item.title: Tampa Bay Rays extend winning streak to three with 4-2 victory over Blue Jays
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays secured their third consecutive win with a 4-2 triumph over the Toronto Blue Jays on Wednesday. Victor Mesa Jr. played a pivotal role, contributing two RBI singles that helped the R...

item.title: South Africa’s Indian Police Legacy: Honoring Heroes and Addressing Corruption
item.description: The article highlights the remarkable contributions of Indian police officers in South Africa, tracing their legacy from historical milestones to contemporary challenges. It begins by celebrating pion...

item.title: Constitutional Case on Lawyer-Client Confidentiality and CHADEMA Leaders' Visits
item.description: The article details the third day of a constitutional case involving Lissu, where he cross-examined the officer-in-charge of the prison regarding restrictions on CHADEMA leaders visiting him. Lissu ac...

item.title: President Marcos' SONA 2026: Key Details and Agenda
item.description: President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr. will deliver his fifth State of the Nation Address (SONA) on July 27, 2026, at the Batasang Pambansa Complex in Quezon City. The event, traditionally held on ...

item.title: Cape Town Family Funds First Phase of St James Coastal Walkway Extension
item.description: An anonymous Cape Town family has committed to funding the first phase of the St James coastal walkway extension, bringing the project closer to reality. The donation, made in 2025, allows the city to...

item.title: Celebrity Congratulate Soso Soberekon On Engagement
item.description: Entertainment executive and businessman Soso Soberekon recently announced his engagement to his partner via an Instagram post, sparking excitement in Nigeria's entertainment industry. The video shared...

item.title: Arrowhead's Triglyceride Drug Shows Promising Results in Clinical Trials
item.description: Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals experienced a significant stock price increase following the release of positive clinical trial data for its triglyceride-lowering drug. The results, presented at a medical c...

item.title: North Vancouver Mall Shooting Involving Knife and RCMP Response
item.description: A shooting incident occurred at a North Vancouver mall during the day, captured on video by multiple witnesses. RCMP officers arrived at the scene, drawing their guns and ordering the suspect to surre...

item.title: New Service Station Boosts Fuel Access and Community Support in Tabora
item.description: A new service station has been established in Tabora, Tanzania, to address the growing demand for fuel and enhance community services. This initiative aims to improve accessibility to essential resour...

item.title: Martha Karua Talks About Choosing Natural Hair for Hairline Health
item.description: Veteran politician Martha Karua shared her journey of embracing natural hair in a candid TikTok video, explaining how she stopped using chemical treatments to protect her hairline. In the clip, Karua ...

item.title: Uttarakhand Raids Uncover Fake Medicines and Packaging Materials
item.description: In a significant operation, authorities in Uttarakhand seized a large quantity of suspected counterfeit medicines, packaging materials, and manufacturing equipment from a residence in Dehradun's East ...

item.title: Jennylyn Mercado Shares Insights from Her Beauty Business Journey
item.description: Jennylyn Mercado, a prominent figure in Philippine entertainment, has transitioned her decades-long career in the spotlight into a successful beauty business venture. The article highlights how her ex...

item.title: Delicious Orie believes Joe Joyce has stayed in boxing too long but says the final decision is personal
item.description: Former Commonwealth champion Delicious Orie has shared his thoughts on Joe Joyce’s future following the heavyweight’s latest defeat, suggesting that the veteran boxer may have continued his career lon...

item.title: African nations balance migration policies with domestic job creation
item.description: The article discusses how African governments are pushing young people to work abroad to tackle youth unemployment, but this approach has long-term implications. Countries like Ghana and Kenya have ex...

item.title: 18-year-old arrested for online bomb threats targeting Bulacan schools
item.description: An 18-year-old man, Alex Mariano, was arrested in Jaen, Nueva Ecija for posting online bomb threats that disrupted classes in public and private schools in San Ildefonso, Bulacan. The suspect was iden...

item.title: Samsung Unveils Galaxy Glasses with Snapdragon AR1 Gen 1 and Google Gemini AI, Launching This Fall
item.description: Samsung has officially launched its Galaxy Glasses, a new entry into the smart glasses market dominated by Meta. The device, unveiled at the Galaxy Unpacked event in London, features Qualcomm's Snapdr...
